sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12193" key="a)plh/stoinos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπλήστ-οινος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n12193.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">insatiate in wine,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀρύταιναι</foreign> Timo<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0018.tlg001:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
